final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing hand-drawn infographic explaining the definitions of and relationships between seven concepts: AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏 (Distillation), and CLI.

Style/medium: hand-drawn illustration infographic, loose ink-sketch linework with light watercolor fills, the warmth of a well-loved whiteboard explanation
Composition: single-page layout with each concept in its own labeled node or bubble, connected by hand-drawn arrows and annotation lines showing relationships; a central hub-and-spoke or flow-map arrangement so the eye can trace concept dependencies naturally
Subject: seven concept nodes — AI (artificial intelligence, the broad field), MCP (model context protocol, the communication layer), AI Agent (autonomous task-executing entity), OpenClaw (specific framework/platform node), AI Skill (discrete callable capability unit), 蒸馏 (knowledge distillation, compressing a large model into a smaller one), CLI (command-line interface, the text-based control layer); each node includes a short plain-language definition written as a hand-lettered caption and a small sketch icon illustrating the concept; relationship arrows labeled with brief connector phrases (e.g. "calls", "uses", "built on", "exposes", "compresses into")
Scene/backdrop: off-white paper texture background, as if drawn on a large sketchbook page
Lighting/mood: flat even light, no shadows, the clarity of a teaching diagram
Color palette: soft warm off-white base with ink-black linework; accent colors per concept node — muted teal, dusty orange, sage green, lavender, warm yellow — enough to distinguish nodes without visual noise
Materials/textures: rough paper grain, hand-inked outlines with slight wobble, light watercolor wash fills inside nodes
Text (verbatim): AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, CLI
Constraints: all seven concepts must appear with both a definition caption and a relationship arrow to at least one other concept; text must be legible at normal viewing size; hand-drawn aesthetic must be consistent across all nodes
Avoid: polished vector flat design, corporate slide-deck aesthetic, 3D effects, photorealistic rendering, cluttered overlapping text, generic stock-infographic layout
